title: Portable Medical Equipment
summary: Hotel-room and mobile-unit capability that lets us complete most outpatient workups without moving the traveler.

items.title: Portable doctor kit
items.body: Vital-signs monitoring, ECG-ready leads, and standard examination tooling carried to every hotel-room visit.

items.title: Portable ECG
items.body: 12-lead ECG used for cardiac screening and triage at the patient's location.

items.title: IV therapy station
items.body: Cannulation, IV bags, electrolyte and anti-emetic preparations — full IV workup on site.

items.title: Nebulizer + SpO₂
items.body: Portable nebulizer with bronchodilator and steroid; pulse-oximetry for respiratory cases.

items.title: Wound-care field kit
items.body: Sterile suturing trays, dressings, antiseptics, and a tetanus protocol kit — ready for minor surgery.

items.title: Portable X-Ray
items.body: On-site radiography for trauma triage; allows fracture rule-out without ambulance transfer.

items.title: Portable ear-wash system
items.body: Therapeutic ear lavage and wax removal performed at the hotel without ENT clinic transfer.

items.title: Point-of-care labs
items.body: CBC, CRP, electrolytes, troponin — sample at the patient, run in our nearest network lab.

items.title: Mobile clinic unit
items.body: Fully equipped vehicle deployable to hotel gates for cases requiring extended observation.

items.title: Ambulance + semi-ambulance
items.body: Stabilization and transport network for escalation to ER or onward hospital care.

gallery.caption: Selected operational photos · ambulance coverage, mobile units, and portable medical equipment.

featured.label: Portable doctor kit
featured.alt: Portable doctor kit used on hotel-room visits
